title: rubus aetnicus
intro: Rubus aetnicus, also known as the Alpine bramble or Alpine raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce the risk of certain diseases. The health benefits of Rubus aetnicus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as arthritis and gout. Rubus aetnicus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to provide relief from pain and inflammation.
